title: Custom Needle Felted Dog Portrait – Handmade Pet Memorial Gift in Wooden Hoop Frame
material: 100% wool roving, glass eyes, wooden hoop
metaTitle: Custom Needle Felted Dog Portrait | Handmade Pet Memorial Gift
metaDescription: Create a lifelike custom needle felted dog portrait from your photo. Handcrafted with wool roving and glass eyes in a wooden hoop. Perfect dog memorial gift. Order now!
shortDescription: Handcrafted custom dog portrait from your photo, felted with 100% wool in a wooden hoop. A heartfelt memorial gift for any pet lover.
fullDescription:
**A Lifelike Memory, Crafted with Love**

Transform your favorite photo of your furry friend into a stunning, one-of-a-kind Needle Felted Dog Portrait. Each piece is meticulously handcrafted from 100% wool roving, capturing your dog’s unique expression and personality. Finished with realistic glass eyes and framed in a natural wooden hoop, this portrait becomes a heartfelt tribute to your beloved companion.

**Customization & Personalization**
- Send us a clear photo of your dog (front-facing preferred).
- Add a name, date, or short message – we’ll needle-felt it into the design.
- Every portrait is made to order, ensuring it’s as unique as your pet.

**Product Specifications**
- Size: 8-inch round wooden hoop (perfect for display on a wall, shelf, or desk)
- Materials: 100% wool roving, glass eyes, natural wood hoop
- Production time: 14–18 business days (handmade with care)

**Perfect for Every Occasion**
- A memorial gift for a pet who has crossed the rainbow bridge
- A surprise for a new pet parent
- A unique birthday or holiday present for any dog lover
- A special keepsake for yourself to cherish daily

**Why Choose Our Portrait?**
- Fully handmade – no machines, just skilled artistry
- Durable and lightweight – safe for any room
- Each piece comes with care instructions to keep it beautiful for years

**Ordering is Simple:** 1) Purchase, 2) Upload your photo, 3) We craft your custom portrait with love. Ready to celebrate your best friend? Add to cart now!
